title: Bombay High Court questions noisy celebrations in Nagpur on Ambedkar Jayanti
description: The Nagpur Bench of the Bombay High Court has invoked Dr BR Ambedkar’s constitutional philosophy to question noisy Ambedkar Jayanti celebrations in Nagpur [Bhupendrakumar Wasnik v. State of Maharashtra & Ors.]A division bench of Justices Urmila Joshi-Phalke and Nivedita P Mehta issued notice to the organisers over alleged violations of noise rules and citizens’ right to a peaceful life under Article 21 of the Constitution.Justices Urmila Joshi-Phalke and Nivedita P MehtaThe Court was hearing
